name: Kanape Me Kasseri
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the crust from the bread and cut into desired shapes with a canape cutter or sharp knife.
2. Place a thin slice of cheese on each piece, cutting to fit the shape of the bread.
3. Arrange the edges with a thin slice of mortadella or other salami.
4. Finish by adding chopped olives, pickles, or relish.
